home.description: I create modern web experiences that are both aesthetic and functional by combining code and design.
home.career_section_p1: My career is built on a 9-year foundation in Urban Planning and Real Estate Appraisal. The skills I acquired in analytical thinking, detailed reporting, and data interpretation during this time are the cornerstones of my software development approach today.
home.career_section_p2: As I transform my passion for technology into a professional career, I carry this discipline from my past into my code. For me, software development isn't just about creating functional tools; it's about producing user-centric, clean, and sustainable solutions. My commitment to detail is my strongest guide in this new field.

about.title: My Story
about.hero_subtitle: A software journey from Izmir to the world. Every line of code tells a story.
about.closing_quote: The best code is the one that tells a story.
about.timeline_1_content: I graduated from Gazi University, Faculty of Architecture, Department of City and Regional Planning. During this period, I built a strong foundation in attention to detail and reporting through intensive work on planning, analysis, and design software.
about.timeline_2_content: I worked for nine years as a field and inspection specialist in the real estate appraisal sector. I advanced my career by obtaining the Certified Appraiser license. The analytical mindset and problem-solving skills I gained during this period laid the foundation for my software career.
about.timeline_3_content: With the decision to change careers, I completed the Software Specialization Training at Neos Software Academy. I received intensive training in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, C#, Bootstrap, React.js, and .NET. During the 7-week internship program, I developed a car rental website from scratch, gaining both front-end and back-end experience.
about.timeline_4_content: I began my professional software career as a Front-end Developer. While actively developing and maintaining corporate projects with Vue.js, I'm expanding my skills in the React ecosystem through new projects. When needed, I also support back-end services with .NET Core, maintaining my full-stack perspective.
about.timeline_5_content: I developed and launched GGHub - a gaming social platform - as a personal project. The first fully functional version was built with Next.js and .NET Core. Steam, Epic, and Google OAuth integrations along with SignalR-based real-time communication features are planned for the second version.
about.timeline_6_content: Through my independent mobile software studio SeptimusLab, I develop and publish AI-powered applications. Fintel for periodic expense tracking and PureScan Cosmetics for cosmetic ingredient analysis are live. Work on PureScan Foods is largely complete. I continue expanding my tech stack with React Native.

projects_page.subtitle: Works I have developed throughout my journey, showcasing my skills.

rent_a_car.title: Rent A Car Full-Stack Platform
rent_a_car.description: A scalable car rental platform built on modern .NET 8 and ASP.NET Core MVC architecture. Features relational database management via Entity Framework Core, Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) using Identity, and secure CRUD operations. Developed during the Neos Software Academy internship, strictly adhering to clean code principles.

purescan.title: PureScan - Cosmetic Analyzer
purescan.description: AI-powered cosmetic product ingredient analyzer. Analyzes ingredients via camera OCR, barcode scanning (OpenBeautyFacts DB), or manual text input. Features risk assessment powered by Gemini 2.5 Flash, skin type compatibility scoring, TTS audio summaries, and an AI chat assistant. Virtual Cabinet feature allows adding analyzed items to inventory and checking cross-product compatibility using conflict engine technology. Supports a freemium model with RevenueCat-powered Pro subscriptions and AdMob integration (banner/reward). Converted to a native application using Capacitor, it is actively published on Google Play Store and available for download.

butce_360.title: Budget360° Expense Tracker
butce_360.description: First prototype developed for credit card cycle tracking and expense management. Built with Vue.js 3.0 and Firebase Realtime Database, it served as the experimental foundation for the Fintel project (V2).

not_defteri.title: Interactive Notebook App
not_defteri.description: Offers users a dynamic notebook experience. Developed using HTML, CSS, and Vue.js 3.0.

fintel.title: Fintel - AI Financial Assistant
fintel.description: Initially prototyped with Gemini 3.0 using a 'Vibecoding' approach, then professionally engineered and refined into a complete SaaS product. A hybrid financial tool (LocalStorage + Firestore) featuring 'Nova AI' integration powered by Groq infrastructure and Llama 3.3 70B model, combined with GLM-OCR technology for high-accuracy PDF and receipt processing, offering expense analysis and personalized savings strategies. Converted to an Android application using Capacitor, available for download on Google Play Store.

gghub.title: GGHub - Gamer Social Platform (Beta)
gghub.description: This Monorepo project, currently under active development, unites .NET 8 and Next.js 15 within a Clean Architecture framework. Fully usable as Version 1 (V1), the platform offers comprehensive features including listing, game search, detailed views, home feed, gamification (badges/levels), leaderboards, and messaging (polling). With the admin panel and user profile algorithms also complete, current work focusses on Steam, Epic, and Google OAuth integrations and implementing SignalR for real-time communication as part of the V2 roadmap.
